attacking_style: Pure sprinter who rarely attacks; wins from fast finishes on flat stages. Shows limited ability on gradients over 5%, fading when initiating efforts on climbs or timing sprints poorly (750m+ is too early).
team_tactics: Requires full leadout train to contend; performs poorly when team support is minimal or absent. Team sets tempo but struggles to position him effectively, particularly in rolling terrain or technical finishes.
terrain_preference: Pan-flat bunch sprints suit him best. Uphill finishes, cobbles, and any gradient above 5-7% neutralize his pure speed advantage. Rolling stage race profiles expose climbing deficiencies early.
vulnerability: Early climbs even in flat stages drop him (50km mark); uphill or cobbled finishes; timing sprints on long straights (initiates 750m+ too early); performs poorly without dedicated leadout support.
key_patterns: Repeatedly initiates sprints too early on long straights, fading before line (2+ observations).
Dropped on initial climbs in stage races regardless of team pacing effort (2+ observations).
Struggles on gradients 5-7%+, fading when attempting efforts on ramps (3 observations).
Mid-pack finishes when team fails to deliver proper leadout, even when pacing (2 observations).
Can win with minimal support only when field decimated by crashes/conditions (2023 Giro).
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Giro stage win signals return to top sprint form after 2022 struggles, though success came with crash-reduced field and minimal support test
